etymology.description: 女(女) (nǚ, "woman") + 宗(宗) (zōng) = phonetic component
etymology.interpretation: The character 㚇 is composed of 女(女) (nǚ, "woman") providing the semantic element, combined with 宗(宗) (zōng), which contributes the phonetic component. It primarily serves as a phonetic element in other characters and doesn't have a standard meaning by itself.
